article.title: Seth Troxler: A Profile of Rising Techno Talent
article.subtitle: Detroit roots and Berlin relocation define a distinctive techno sound.
article.author: A. Stern
article.excerpt: Seth Troxler, at only 22 years of age, has already made significant strides in the techno scene with his Detroit-influenced sound and recent move to Berlin.

content.text: Seth Troxler is a young artist whose achievements already far outweigh his age. His Detroit roots are unmistakable, and his recent relocation to Berlin has quickly earned him a place in the elite of the European techno scene.

Troxler's musical influences are eclectic, ranging from the chirping of crickets to the whirring of space ships and the sweet sounds of whistling voodoo magic. These diverse inspirations contribute to his distinctive techno sound.
With releases on revered labels such as Spectral, Wagon Repair, and M_NUS, Troxler's work has been widely played and recognized. Each release further defines his unique approach to techno.

Recent releases include This Is Then, DJ-Kicks (Seth Troxler) [DJ Mix], Mixmag Presents Seth Troxler: The Illusion Nouveau (DJ Mix), Mixmag Presents Jamie Jones vs. Seth Troxler, and Love Never Sleeps.
